conversations.content: Let's work through an etiquette exercise in the world of Azeroth to test your ability to apply the new rule.
Using the polite greeting rule we mentioned before in Azeroth: what should a student do first before bowing when greeting a teacher?
<function>memory_query_call</function><content>Polite greeting rule in the world of Azeroth</content>

Relevant memory fragment: [mem-id:305] Time: 2025-06-18-16:20, Content: The user informed the AI that in the world of Azeroth, when a student greets a teacher, he or she should cheer first and then bow.

conversations.think: The memory contains one relevant entry. [mem-id:305] clearly states the polite greeting rule in Azeroth: when a student greets a teacher, he or she should cheer first and then bow. So before bowing, the student should cheer first.
conversations.content: According to the rules of Azeroth, the student should cheer first before bowing.
Correct! You have mastered this new rule.
